title: CHECKERS - Dames
description: Hi gamers, I created my Checkers app as an example of a good checkers game for me and published it in the Store as a free board game for you. I hope you will enjoy it and have a lot of fun playing it. :)
instructions: To win a game of checkers you have to move your pieces towards your opponent s side of the board You can move faster by jumping your opponent s pieces and removing them from the board
